Partial renovation of the first floor of an existing hotel to include bar. No exterior work NOTE: Any exterior work will require review and permit from VCC.

Renovation and addition to an existing 2-story mixed-use structure as per plans. This is Phase 1 of a multi-phase constructure project. The scope includes renovation of the ground floor restaurant (Walk-Ons), moving an existing stairwell, a 2-story addition that will include a new stairwell, an addition to the existing gallery, and other work as noted on the plans. Partial Fee - in lieu of stormwater improvements as shown on the approved SWMP. The fee covers area included in permits for Phase 1 and for Phase 2 of the project. The Phase 2 portion stands as surety for a specific portion of Phase 1 which is allowed as temporary By-pass runoff. No property line encroachments to be constructed under this permit. TCO GOOD FOR 30 DAYS---TILL 10-28-21 FINAL C/O ISSUED 5-1-25
